top_strength: Efficiently handled a complex rescheduling request — found availability on a sister branch, proactively explained the crew size logic, and confirmed the new date cleanly.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass was completely missing and the Clock section was nearly absent — easy wins that take under 90 seconds each.
phone_presence_notes: Efficient and friendly but called the customer by the wrong name ('Collin' vs 'Connie') — task-focused rather than relationship-focused.
